summary: Stage 32 Backend API Testing - All 6 APIs working correctly via localhost. Preview environment returning 502 errors (infrastructure issue, not code issue)

minor.issue: Returns 502 'The preview environment is not responding' - infrastructure instability
minor.note: All APIs work correctly via localhost:3000

passed_tests.test: Forex API GET /api/v2/forex - Returns live exchange rates
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns success:true, baseCurrency:THB, rates for USD/RUB/CNY/EUR etc

passed_tests.test: Forex conversion THB to USD with FunnyRate
passed_tests.result: PASS - 10000 THB → 326.65 USD, FunnyRate correctly applied (market*1.035)

passed_tests.test: Forex conversion THB to RUB with FunnyRate
Forex conversion THB to CNY with FunnyRate
Geo API GET /api/v2/geo - Detects location and recommends currency
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns currency recommendation (USD fallback for server IPs), sample conversion

passed_tests.test: Push API GET /api/v2/push - Returns template list
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns 6 templates: NEW_MESSAGE, BOOKING_REQUEST, BOOKING_CONFIRMED, PAYMENT_RECEIVED, CHECKIN_REMINDER, PAYOUT_READY

passed_tests.test: Push API validation - Register requires params
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns error 'token and userId required' when params missing

passed_tests.test: Payout Cron GET /api/cron/payouts?secret=... - Returns 24H rule status
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns success:true, rule='Payouts released at 18:00, 24 hours after check-in'

passed_tests.test: Payout Cron unauthorized - Rejects without secret
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns 401 Unauthorized without secret parameter

passed_tests.test: Check-in Reminder Cron GET /api/cron/checkin-reminder?secret=... - Returns status
passed_tests.result: PASS - Returns success:true, scheduledTime='14:00 (Asia/Bangkok)', todayCheckIns count
PASS - Verified for USD, RUB, CNY: funnyRate = marketRate * 1.035

features: 12 supported currencies with symbols and locales
Fallback to USD for unknown locations
6 notification templates (NEW_MESSAGE, BOOKING_REQUEST, BOOKING_CONFIRMED, PAYMENT_RECEIVED, CHECKIN_REMINDER, PAYOUT_READY)
JWT signing for FCM access token
Payouts released at 18:00 on DAY AFTER check-in
Commission rate snapshotting at booking creation
GET returns all rates with FunnyRate markup
GET returns location detection and currency recommendation
POST sends push notifications to guests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 32 backend APIs fully verified via localhost. All 6 features working: 1) Forex API with live ExchangeRate-API rates and 3.5% FunnyRate markup, 2) Forex conversion THB→USD/RUB/CNY, 3) Geo API with IP detection and currency recommendation, 4) Push API with 6 FCM templates, 5) Payout cron with 24H escrow rule, 6) Check-in reminder cron at 14:00. Preview environment has 502 issues (infrastructure).

environment_notes.preview_status: 502 on API calls, 200 on homepage - infrastructure issue
environment_notes.localhost_status: All APIs working correctly on localhost:3000
